strategy: Anti-heal boss: Doom and Gloom (-75%) is up from round 1, your incoming healing sits at -200%, and healing triggers punishment spells — survive on shields and absorbs, not heals, and kill fast.
He's immune to Globals, so don't waste time on global prisms or auras — buff with blades and traps instead.
Every 2nd round he Beguiles a wizard by slot in order (slot 1 round 2, slot 2 round 4, and so on); keep the beguiled wizard from wasting your setup, and note empty slots are skipped.
He shields himself -80% against healing every 3rd round and recasts Doom and Gloom from round 4 on — again, don't build around heals.
Blade and Feint him, then land a big hit before beguiles and the anti-heal grind you down.
cheatNotes: Late wizards get a protected -75% Mass Infection — join on time.
Round 1 he casts Doom and Gloom (-75%), crushing all healing.
Round 1 he also casts a Shadow Guardian Spirit (unknown effect).
Every 2nd round he Beguiles a wizard for two rounds, going slot by slot.
Round 8 he beguiles slot 4, then the cycle repeats.
If the targeted slot is empty he skips the beguile.
Every 3rd round he puts a -80% healing shield on himself.
From round 4 on he recasts Doom and Gloom (-75%) every 2nd round — don't rely on heals.
Cast a heal and he may punish you with one of the spells below.
He also applies a -20% incoming healing aura for 6 rounds — stack shields instead of healing.
